title: UK Export Finance Country Heads and London Team - Americas
body: "Team Americas (London Office)  Co-Head, Global Origination   Emma Thomas      Email emma.thomas@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Regional Head   George Hames      Email George.hames@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Senior Business Origination Officer   Natalie Rybova      Email Natalie.rybova@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Business Origination Officer   Bradley Poku      Email Bradley.poku@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Country Heads (By Region)  Andes   Camilo Neira   Based at the British Embassy BogotáCarrera 9, No 76-49, Piso 8 Edificio ING BaringsBogotáColombia     Email camilo.neira@fcdo.gov.uk         Brazil and Southern Core   Fabio Accunzo   Based at the British Embassy BrasiliaQuadra 801 - Conjunto K - Lote 08Av. das Nações - Asa SulCEP70408-900  Brazil     Email fabio.accunzo@fcdo.gov.uk         Canada   Ozgur Kutay   Based at the British Consulate General Toronto777 Bay Street, Suite 2800Toronto Ontario M5G 2G2Canada     Email ozgur.kutay@fcdo.gov.uk         Central America   Gerson Perez   Based at the British Embassy Dominican RepublicAv. Winston Churchill 1099Santo DomingoDominican Republic     Email Gerson.Perez@fcdo.gov.uk         US, Mexico and Commonwealth Caribbean   Jesse McDougall   Based at the British Consulate General Houston1301 Fannin Street #2400Houston Texas TX 77002USA     Email jesse.mcdougall@fcdo.gov.uk        "
